description_long: This house features a two-story brick and concrete structure with a flat roof, accented by multiple chimneys and a rooftop access enclosure. The exterior walls are primarily dark red brick with beige concrete bands framing the windows and balcony. The front facade includes a recessed entryway and a covered balcony, with visible interior details such as tiled floors and staircases. Windows are rectangular and asymmetrically placed, with some protected by metal bars. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, with minimal window openings and a prominent vertical brick chimney. The rooftop includes utility structures and a small fenced area, suggesting access for maintenance or leisure.
description: A two-story brick and concrete house with a flat roof, recessed entryway, and covered balcony. Features include multiple chimneys, asymmetrical windows, and a rooftop access enclosure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid brick and concrete wall, a single window, and the layered flat roof with chimneys.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the recessed entryway, covered balcony, tiled floor, and visible interior stairway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the open balcony, tiled floor, and partial view of the interior staircase.
description_view_3: Rear view with a mostly solid black wall, a single window, and a prominent vertical brick chimney running up the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with covered balcony above, simple door, and minimal decorative elements.
